text_block_list.name: Magazine Reporter
text_block_list.text: E-excuse me! Can I have a few minutes of your time? I'm an editor for Kawaii-Girl magazine...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh! I know that magazine! Everyone in my class
loves it!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hm... But I'm pretty busy and have to get to
training...

text_block_list.name: Magazine Reporter
text_block_list.text:
No—wait! It's just for a snapshot on the street
corner. It'll only take five minutes!

text_block_list.name: Magazine Reporter
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, you're so adorable. But a few snapshots
aren't enough to convey your true cuteness!

text_block_list.name: Magazine Reporter
text_block_list.text:
You need your own feature! I'm going to speak
with the head editor immediately! Please give me
just a little more of your time!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Could you include my socials with the
pictures?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Okay, then... Just a little longer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even though she ends up skipping training, the
magazine feature causes Curren Chan's followers
to skyrocket.
